original_question:
Buying 20 pencils, 3 erasers, and 2 notebooks costs 32 yuan; buying 39 pencils, 5 erasers, and 3 notebooks costs 58 yuan. Calculate the cost of buying 5 pencils, 5 erasers, and 5 notebooks.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}

similar_questions.question: Buying 25 markers, 4 erasers, and 3 sketchbooks costs 40 yuan; buying 45 markers, 6 erasers, and 4 sketchbooks costs 66 yuan. Calculate the cost of buying 6 markers, 6 erasers, and 6 sketchbooks.

Buying 10 textbooks, 3 pens, and 2 highlighters costs 31 yuan; buying 20 textbooks, 5 pens, and 4 highlighters costs 58 yuan. Calculate the cost of buying 7 textbooks, 2 pens, and 3 highlighters.
Buying 18 rulers, 6 erasers, and 2 calculators costs 36 yuan; buying 35 rulers, 8 erasers, and 5 calculators costs 64 yuan. Calculate the cost of buying 8 rulers, 3 erasers, and 4 calculators.
Buying 12 globes, 4 markers, and 3 charts costs 29 yuan; buying 27 globes, 5 markers, and 6 charts costs 53 yuan. Calculate the cost of buying 3 globes, 5 markers, and 3 charts.
